calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Continued To Nov-15-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:

David J. Foran, Esq. on behalf of plainitiff Paul Kantos
Deborah A. Atkins, defendant in pro per

The parties indicated that this matter has settled. Terms of the settlement were as follows:
Defendant agrees to vacate premises located at 20 Joost Avenue, San Francisco, CA. by 5:00 p.m. on February 1, 2005. Plaintiff waives back rent in the amount of $1,272.00. If defendant fails to comply with the settlement, plaintiff can on 24-hour notice, come in ex parte for judgment for possession and all back rent due. Settlement signed and filed in open court.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: V. Mu/D. Hakewill Reporter: JoAnn Bryce, #3321 (206)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID FORAN FOR PLAINTIFF PAUL KANTOS, ALSO PRESENT
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DEBORAH ATKINS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN.
